message: fix: skip unknown Claude model pricing

files.patch:
@@ -114,27 +114,6 @@ enum CostUsagePricing {

             cacheReadInputCostPerTokenAboveThreshold: 6e-7),

-            cacheCreationInputCostPerToken: 0,
